revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-5-195

Horizontal deflection of a column or strut caused by an eccentric or excessive compressive vertical load.


Note: In French the phenomenon is called flambage and the resultant is called flambement.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Buckling (of a strut or column)}}
